stage_identity.evidence: Teen Byte form maintained: gangly proportions, fluffy texture, big eyes visible in sleeping pose. Silhouette matches expected teen morphology with elongated limbs.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean pixel art preserved: 2D forms, dithered shading visible, readable silhouette maintained at 512x512 resolution. No painterly or photoreal drift detected.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Food bowl kibble level reduced from previous state - bowl now appears nearly empty matching 29% satiety (down from 32%). Sleeping pose with Z's maintained.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, malformed anatomy, duplicated parts, or smeared objects visible. Clean render with coherent forms.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Single food bowl positioned on floor to right of bed. Trophy shelf above desk with golden 10-day trophy on left, green plant on right - proper spacing maintained, no overlap. Single instances of all props.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk with oversized laptop visible to left. Chicago skyline window showing twinkling city lights in background. All three anchor elements present and recognizable.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Deep night scene with purple-blue ambient glow matching 5 AM Chicago time. Sleeping Byte with floating Z's matches is_sleeping=true state. Content but hungry expression fitting satiety level.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Normal mode - reground cleanup check not applicable. Incremental edit focused on single satiety change only.
